title_page.title: KitchenAid Artisan â Made for Makers
title_page.author: wavelet-director

elements.text: A KitchenAid Artisan stand mixer in Empire Red sits on a polished marble counter. Warm amber side light rakes across the dome. Copper saucepans blur in the background. The camera does an extremely slow push-in. Eyebrow text rises in: For the ones who still make it by hand. A short red rule draws in beneath.

Macro: the whisk attachment turns through soft peaks of whipped cream, glossy ribbons folding in slow motion. Shallow depth of field; only the whisk-and-cream is in focus. Center text fades in: Built to be passed down.
End card. The KitchenAid wordmark, large, red on cream. Tagline: Made for makers. URL: kitchenaid.com. The music resolves and holds.
